text:
Perfect! Now when you try to swap, look at the browser console (press F12) and you'll see a section that says:

```
=== EXECUTE SWAP DEBUG ===
From Chain: Ethereum ID: 1 vmType: evm
To Chain: Solana ID: 792703809 vmType: svm
From Token: ETH Address: 0x0000...
To Token: SOL Address: 0x0000...
...
```

Please try the swap again and copy/paste that debug section from the console. That will show me exactly what's being sent to Relay and I can fix the issue.
